programme.title: BKFC 49
programme.desc: The vacant welterweight title is up for grabs at BKFC 49 between Gorjan Slaveski & Jake Lindsey. From Aug. 25, 2023.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: The stand-up game kicks off the final episode of the season, and a poker legend pays the penalty to the table; Eric Hicks rides a heater of hot hands and hot plays as he continues to drag pots, while Matt Berkey plays a big one against Matt Steinberg.

programme.desc: Mike Fink sets out for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Arkansas.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Mike Fink sets out alongside his dad, Jeff, to take on Scotland’s iconic West Highland Way.
